name: Banana-Nut Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups mashed ripe bananas (from 3 medium bananas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar in a bowl using an electric mixer at medium speed until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
4. Stir in the mashed bananas.
5. Add the dry ingredients all at once, stirring just enough to moisten.
6. Gently mix in the chopped nuts.
7. Spoon the batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling them about 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 20 minutes in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit, or until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with homemade jam or jelly.
